zh.Of Hoeckelheim, Northeim, Niedersachsen,: 德國尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆賀可拉海姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV於1109年出生在德國貝也爾茲包格時，他的父親Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III44歲，母親Liutgard von Hohenberg34歲。他和Bertha Von Putelendorf至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他於1132年在德國貝也爾茲包格被列為burggraf von würzburg。他去世於1159年10月18日在巴勒斯坦享年50歲，埋葬在巴勒斯坦。

zh-hans.Of Hoeckelheim, Northeim, Niedersachsen,: 德国尼德薩辛藍德可萊斯 諾特海姆賀可拉海姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV于1109年出生在德国貝也爾茲包格时，他的父亲Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III44岁，母亲Liutgard von Hohenberg34岁。他和Bertha Von Putelendorf至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他于1132年在德国貝也爾茲包格被列为burggraf von würzburg。他去世于1159年10月18日在巴勒斯坦享年50岁，埋葬在巴勒斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: Count
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Anglo-Norman French counte ‘count’ (Old French conte, from Latin comes, comitem); a title of French and Norman nobility, ranking as equivalent to English Earl .

variants.name: Earl
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English e(o)rl ‘earl’, a traditional English title of nobility equivalent in rank to French and Norman Count .

nameMeanings.name: Of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Cheng, Jing, Kam Fung, Wai Shing, Wing, Yali, Yuk.
variant Romanization of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Ou
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Ying, Ching, Heng, Hong, Jia, Kuang Yu, Li-Ching, Cho, Chong, Chung, Sa.  Southeast Asian Lichun, Ming, Quan, Roeun, Sokhom, Chau, Hai, Leang, Ly, Nhanh, Phan, Pho, Tha.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 歐, meaning ‘to sing someone's praise’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the placename Dong Ou (東甌), a fief (in present-day Wenzhou in Zhejiang province) which was granted to Yao in 192  BC . It is said that Yao was a descendant of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the placename Ou Yu (歐餘), the name of a fief (located in present-day Zhejiang province) that was granted to Ti, the second son of Wujiang (reigned 355–333  BC ), king of the state of Yue (located mainly in present-day Zhejiang and Jiangxi provinces) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 區, originally denoting an ancient vessel for measurement in ancient Chinese: from the personal name of Ou Zhizi (歐治子), an expert sword-maker who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ). Some of his descendants inherited Ou (歐) as their surname, simplifying the Chinese character 歐 to 區.

nameMeanings.name: Henneberg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Beate, Ewald, Kurt, Ulrich.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Henneberger
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Fritz, Gerhard.
German: habitational name for someone from a place called Henneberg (see   Henneberg  ).

variants.name: Henneberry
meanings: Americanized form of German and Dutch   Henneberg  .

nameMeanings.name: Berthold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV was born in 1109, in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany, his father, Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III, was 44 and his mother, Liutgard von Hohenberg, was 34. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Bertha Von Putelendorf. In 1132, his occupation is listed as burggraf von würzburg in Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany. He died on 18 October 1159, in Palestine, at the age of 50, and was buried in Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV est né en 1109, à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Liutgard von Hohenberg, avait 34 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Bertha Von Putelendorf. En 1132, sa profession de son indiquée est burggraf von würzburg à Würzburg, Bayern, Allemagne. Il est décédé le 18 octobre 1159, à Palestine, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV 1109 in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III 44 und seine Mutter Liutgard von Hohenberg 34. Er hatte mit Bertha Von Putelendorf mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1132 ist sein Beruf als burggraf von würzburg in Würzburg, Bayern, Deutschland aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Oktober 1159 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Palästina und wurde in Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV è nato il nel 1109 nel Würzburg, Bayern, Germania, il suo padre, Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Liutgard von Hohenberg, aveva 34 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Bertha Von Putelendorf. Nel 1132, la sua occupazione è indicata come burggraf von würzburg nel Würzburg, Bayern, Germania. Morì il 18 ottobre 1159, nel Palestina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Palestina.

ja.Würzburg, Bavaria, Germany: ドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Berthold Count Of Henneberg IVが1109年にドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグで生まれた時，父Gottwald Count Of Henneberg IIIは44歳，母Liutgard von Hohenbergは34歳であった。彼はBertha Von Putelendorfとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。1132年，ドイツバイエルンウuルズブルグでの職業はburggraf von würzburgと記録されている。彼は1159年10月18日にパレスチナで50歳で死去し，パレスチナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV(이)가 1109년 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Liutgard von Hohenberg(은)는 34세였다. 그는 Bertha Von Putelendorf(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1132년, 그의 직업은 독일 베이른 wu르즈버그에서 burggraf von würzburg이었다. 그는 1159년 10월 18일 팔레스타인에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 팔레스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV nasceu em 1109, em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Liutgard von Hohenberg, tinha 34 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Bertha Von Putelendorf. Em 1132, sua profissão aparece como burggraf von würzburg em Würzburg, Bayern, Alemanha. Ele faleceu em 18 de outubro de 1159, em Palestina, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Palestina.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV родился в 1109 г. в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия, его отцу по имени Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Liutgard von Hohenberg, 34. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Bertha Von Putelendorf. В 1132 году он работал по профессии burggraf von würzburg в местности вuрзбург, беиирн, Германия. Он умер 18 октября 1159 г. в местности Палестина в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности Палестина.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Berthold Count Of Henneberg IV nació en 1109, en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Gottwald Count Of Henneberg III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Liutgard von Hohenberg, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Bertha Von Putelendorf. En 1132, su ocupación registrada era burggraf von würzburg en Würzburg, Bayern, Alemania. Murió el 18 de octubre de 1159, en Palestina, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Palestina.
